basics.name: Somesh Dwivedi
basics.title: Technology Analyst | MERN Stack Developer
basics.summary: MERN Stack Developer with 2+ years of experience building scalable, production-grade web applications using MongoDB, Express.js React.js, and Node.js. Experienced in designing RESTful APIs, implementing responsive front-end architectures, optimizing application performance, and working in Agile environments. Hands-on experience with cloud-based deployments, CI/CD awareness, and collaborative development in enterprise environments.
highlights: Successfully delivered multiple projects from concept to deployment.
Experienced in REST APIs, authentication, cloud deployment, and Git-based workflows.
Strong problem-solving skills with a focus on performance and scalability.

experience.description: As a MERN Stack Developer at Infosys, I have been responsible for designing, developing, and deploying scalable web applications that enhance client business processes and improve user experiences.
bullets: Designed and developed scalable MERN stack applications serving enterprise-level users.
Built reusable and responsive UI components using React.js, improving page load performance.
Developed RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js with MongoDB for efficient data handling.
Optimized backend APIs and database queries, reducing response time and performance bottlenecks.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams in Agile environment to deliver features on time.
Conducted code reviews and enforced clean code and best development practices.
Contributed to CI/CD awareness and deployment workflows in enterprise applications.

experience.company: Allsoft Solutions and services Private Limited
bullets: Completed a 6-month hands-on internship focusing on Java Full Stack development.
Gained practical experience in Core Java, object-oriented programming (OOP), and backend development.
Developed web application components using Java, JSP, Servlets, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Worked with relational databases using SQL for data storage and retrieval.
Learned end-to-end application flow including frontend, backend, and database integration.
Assisted in building and testing REST-style backend logic and CRUD operations.
Collaborated with mentors to understand application architecture, debugging techniques, and clean coding practices.
Improved understanding of full-stack development lifecycle and software engineering fundamentals.

achievements.title: Scalable Solutions
achievements.description: Contributed to scalable solutions that now support thousands of users daily.

achievements.title: Project Delivery
achievements.description: Successfully delivered multiple projects that improved business efficiency and client satisfaction.

achievements.title: Performance Optimization
achievements.description: Optimized backend performance, improving API response time and overall application scalability.

projects.title: DevTinder App
projects.description: A full-stack MERN application enabling developers to discover and connect with nearby developers based on location. Implemented secure user authentication, RESTful APIs, Tinder-style swipe functionality, and real-time updates.

projects.title: Food Delivery App
projects.description: A responsive food ordering web application with real-time cart state updates. Built reusable modular UI components and implemented intuitive UX patterns for smooth navigation.

education.institution: Chandigarh Group of Colleges, Landran, Punjab
